zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Challons於大約1370年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Sir Robert Challons31歲，母親Joan Beauchamp27歲。他於1393年與Blanche De Waterton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年2月6日在英國戴文享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Challons于大约1370年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Sir Robert Challons31岁，母亲Joan Beauchamp27岁。他于1393年与Blanche De Waterton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1445年2月6日在英国戴文享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Challons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: variant of Challen with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Challen
meanings: 1  Norman, English: locative name from Chalon-sur-Saône or Châlons-sur-Marne in France.
2 English: nickname possibly from Middle English chalon ‘blanket’; see Challinor .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Challons was born about 1370, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Challons, was 31 and his mother, Joan Beauchamp, was 27. He married Blanche De Waterton in 1393. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 February 1445, in Devon, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Challons est né environ 1370, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Challons, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Beauchamp, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Blanche De Waterton en 1393. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 février 1445, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Challons um 1370 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Challons 31 und seine Mutter Joan Beauchamp 27. Er hat 1393 Blanche De Waterton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Februar 1445 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Challons è nato il circa 1370 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Challons, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Beauchamp, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Blanche De Waterton nel 1393. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 febbraio 1445, nel Devon, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Challonsが約1370年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Challonsは31歳，母Joan Beauchampは27歳であった。1393年にBlanche De Watertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1445年2月6日にイギリスデボンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Challons(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Challons(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Beauchamp(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1393년 Blanche De Waterton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 2월 6일 영국 데폰에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Challons nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Challons, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Beauchamp, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche De Waterton em 1393. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1445, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Challons родился около 1370 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Challons было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Beauchamp, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche De Waterton в 1393 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 февраля 1445 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Challons nació aproximadamente 1370, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Challons, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Beauchamp, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Blanche De Waterton en 1393. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1445, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
